case_title: LUIS SOTO VS. DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SOTO, LUIS DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTO, LUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,059.04 FILED BY SOTO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LUIS SOTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MADIHA TAQI. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE TO HAVE THE COURT HEAR THIS MATTER TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
